summary: Iteration 50: Complete Testing of Menu Grid Phase 2, Onboarding/Pricing, Kitchen KDS, Tap/Table POS. All backend API tests passed (24/24). All frontend UI tests passed. The 2-step checkout flow (lead capture → Stripe redirect) works end-to-end.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: nested buttons in item cards

critical_code_review_comments: TapPage.js and TablePage.js have nested button elements causing React hydration warnings. Consider changing item cards from <button> to <div> with onClick and appropriate role/tabindex for accessibility.
seed_data_creation: Demo ecosystem auto-seeded via ensure_demo_ecosystem() with 7 guests, 8 tables, KDS tickets
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from Menu Grid Phase 2 are fully working: Pricing page with 3 plans ($79/$149/$299), 2-step checkout (lead capture + Stripe), Kitchen KDS with kanban columns, Tap/Table pages with POS layout (vertical category sidebar + large touch-friendly grid). Login works with both test credentials.

checkout_flow.redirects_to_stripe: ✅ PASSED - Stripe checkout at $79 for Starter

kitchen_page.shows_5_kanban_columns: ✅ PASSED - Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed

tap_page.shows_tabs_sidebar: ✅ PASSED - Open tabs list with search

stripe_integration_note: Stripe integration is using sk_test_emergent (Emergent test key). Checkout sessions are created successfully and redirect to real Stripe checkout in sandbox mode.
